violations.text: Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils between uses shall be stored in one of the following manners: on a dry clean surface, in water that is maintained at 135 degrees Fahreneheit or more, or in water with sufficient velocity to flush particulates to the drain. Utensils were moved to a dry clean surface during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The door to the establishment toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors that open to food preparation areas shall be self-closing to limit potential contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2025
